dismissalText.commentary: Sanju Samson b Kartik Tyagi 48 (32b 4x4 3x6 55m) SR: 150

dismissalComment.html: straight through Samson, and that is too hot to handle for the World Cup winner! Zipped in full on middle and off. Bowled at 148.1kph and Samson loses his shape. Tries to go too square, and does not come to grips with the pace either. Indulges in a fresh-air shot and hears the rattling of his stumps soon after. Big, big wicket for KKR!

dismissalText.commentary: Ruturaj Gaikwad c Powell b Roy 7 (6b 1x4 0x6 12m) SR: 116.66

dismissalComment.html: straight to deep mid wicket, and the experiment has worked wonders! Fired in full just outside off. Gaikwad seems to pre-meditate the sweep and has to then adjust because of how full this is. Quite close to the body too and Gaikwad cannot free his arms fully. Simple chip to the sweeper, and Gaikwad throws his head back in disappointment immediately. Gaikwad's lean run continues, and this is a vital breakthrough for KKR!

dismissalText.commentary: Ayush Mhatre c Ramandeep Singh b Arora 38 (17b 6x4 2x6 16m) SR: 223.52

dismissalComment.html: this goes a mile up, and taken on the fence! Arora sticks to the short ball and finally it yields dividends. Gets a little too big on off stump, and Mhatre cannot generate the power he wants. Skies it and Ramandeep, stood at deep mid wicket, does the rest. A brisk cameo from Mhatre and he, like Gaikwad, is also livid with himself as he walks off!

image.longCaption: Vaibhav Arora, player portrait

dismissalText.commentary: Dewald Brevis c Arora b Kartik Tyagi 41 (29b 4x4 2x6 61m) SR: 141.37

dismissalComment.html: sliced tamely to short third, and another CSK batter fails to make his start count! Slower ball on a back of a length outside off. Brevis swishes at it with all his might but the lack of pace means the ball spirals off the top edge. Arora dives smartly to his left and Brevis has to walk back for a 29-ball 41!

dismissalText.commentary: Sarfaraz Khan b Narine 23 (18b 1x4 2x6 29m) SR: 127.77

dismissalComment.html: off stump knocked back, and Narine gets rid of Sarfaraz! Back of a length, angling into off. Pitches and moves away, though. Sarfaraz has an ungainly swipe across the line and misses the ball by a mile. Off stump rattled, and Sarfaraz's scratchy cameo comes to an end!

dismissalText.commentary: Ruturaj Gaikwad c Powell b Roy 7 (6b 1x4 0x6 12m) SR: 116.66

dismissalComment.html: straight to deep mid wicket, and the experiment has worked wonders! Fired in full just outside off. Gaikwad seems to pre-meditate the sweep and has to then adjust because of how full this is. Quite close to the body too and Gaikwad cannot free his arms fully. Simple chip to the sweeper, and Gaikwad throws his head back in disappointment immediately. Gaikwad's lean run continues, and this is a vital breakthrough for KKR!

dismissalText.commentary: Ayush Mhatre c Ramandeep Singh b Arora 38 (17b 6x4 2x6 16m) SR: 223.52

dismissalComment.html: this goes a mile up, and taken on the fence! Arora sticks to the short ball and finally it yields dividends. Gets a little too big on off stump, and Mhatre cannot generate the power he wants. Skies it and Ramandeep, stood at deep mid wicket, does the rest. A brisk cameo from Mhatre and he, like Gaikwad, is also livid with himself as he walks off!

dismissalText.commentary: Sanju Samson b Kartik Tyagi 48 (32b 4x4 3x6 55m) SR: 150

dismissalComment.html: straight through Samson, and that is too hot to handle for the World Cup winner! Zipped in full on middle and off. Bowled at 148.1kph and Samson loses his shape. Tries to go too square, and does not come to grips with the pace either. Indulges in a fresh-air shot and hears the rattling of his stumps soon after. Big, big wicket for KKR!

dismissalText.commentary: Cameron Green b Noor Ahmad 0 (1b 0x4 0x6 1m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: hot knife through butter, and KKR's million-dollar buy has been dispensed with for a golden duck! Seems like the leg-spinner, fizzing through on a back of a length outside off. Spins in with the angle and Green is all at sea. Tries to punch it too square on the off side and misses it, with the ball rattling into middle and leg. Green's woeful run continues; CSK tightening their grip now!
